author: Guo et al. (2017)
title: On Calibration of Modern Neural Networks
why: Model deep sering overconfident; temperature scaling bikin probabilitas jujur

author: Angelopoulos & Bates (2021)
title: A Gentle Introduction to Conformal Prediction and Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification
why: Pintu masuk conformal: interval prediksi bergaransi tanpa asumsi distribusi

author: Taylor & Letham (2018)
title: Forecasting at Scale
why: Prophet: forecast bisnis musiman gampang dipakai analis non-ahli

author: Gal & Ghahramani (2016)
title: Dropout as a Bayesian Approximation: Representing Model Uncertainty in Deep Learning
why: MC Dropout: ambil ketidakpastian Bayesian cuma dari dropout pas inferensi

author: Lakshminarayanan et al. (2017)
title: Simple and Scalable Predictive Uncertainty Estimation using Deep Ensembles
why: Ensemble deep = estimasi uncertainty simpel yang kalahin metode Bayesian ribet

author: Arik & Pfister (2019)
title: TabNet: Attentive Interpretable Tabular Learning
why: Deep learning buat data tabel pakai attention, tetap interpretable

author: Hardt et al. (2016)
title: Equality of Opportunity in Supervised Learning
why: Definisi fairness equalized odds + cara post-processing bikin model adil

author: Romano et al. (2019)
title: Conformalized Quantile Regression
why: Gabung quantile regression + conformal buat interval adaptif lebar-sempit

author: Salinas et al. (2017)
title: DeepAR: Probabilistic Forecasting with Autoregressive Recurrent Networks
why: RNN autoregresif forecast ribuan time series sekaligus, output probabilistik

author: Gorishniy et al. (2021)
title: Revisiting Deep Learning Models for Tabular Data
why: FT-Transformer: baseline transformer tabular yang jujur lawan GBDT

author: Popov et al. (2019)
title: Neural Oblivious Decision Ensembles for Deep Learning on Tabular Data
why: NODE: decision tree dibikin differentiable jadi bisa dilatih end-to-end

author: Tarvainen & Valpola (2017)
title: Mean teachers are better role models: Weight-averaged consistency targets improve semi-supervised deep learning results
why: Mean Teacher: guru rata-rata bobot jadi target konsistensi semi-supervised

author: Berthelot et al. (2019)
title: MixMatch: A Holistic Approach to Semi-Supervised Learning
why: Gabung mixup + pseudo-label + augmentasi jadi resep SSL kuat

author: Sohn et al. (2020)
title: FixMatch: Simplifying Semi-Supervised Learning with Consistency and Confidence
why: SSL super simpel: pseudo-label percaya-diri + augmentasi kuat, hasil SOTA

author: Ganin et al. (2015)
title: Domain-Adversarial Training of Neural Networks
why: DANN: gradient reversal bikin fitur invarian antar domain

author: Sener & Savarese (2017)
title: Active Learning for Convolutional Neural Networks: A Core-Set Approach
why: Active learning sebagai core-set: pilih batch sampel paling representatif

author: Gal et al. (2017)
title: Deep Bayesian Active Learning with Image Data
why: Pakai ketidakpastian Bayesian buat pilih data yang wajib dilabeli

author: Oreshkin et al. (2019)
title: N-BEATS: Neural basis expansion analysis for interpretable time series forecasting
why: Blok basis-expansion murni deep, interpretable, kalahin statistik klasik

author: Lim et al. (2019)
title: Temporal Fusion Transformers for Interpretable Multi-horizon Time Series Forecasting
why: TFT: attention multi-horizon plus interpretasi fitur mana yang penting

author: Sagawa et al. (2019)
title: Distributionally Robust Neural Networks for Group Shifts: On the Importance of Regularization for Worst-Case Generalization
why: Group DRO: optimasi worst-case grup biar tahan distribution shift

author: Blundell et al. (2015)
title: Weight Uncertainty in Neural Networks
why: Bayes by Backprop: latih distribusi atas bobot, bukan angka mati

author: Wager & Athey (2018)
title: Estimation and Inference of Heterogeneous Treatment Effects using Random Forests
why: Causal forest: efek treatment per individu plus interval kepercayaan valid

author: Liu et al. (2018)
title: DARTS: Differentiable Architecture Search
why: NAS jadi optimasi gradient, cari arsitektur tanpa RL mahal

author: Damianou & Lawrence (2013)
title: Deep Gaussian Processes
why: Tumpuk GP jadi layer dalam, Bayesian penuh walau data sedikit

author: Zheng et al. (2018)
title: DAGs with NO TEARS: Continuous Optimization for Structure Learning
why: Belajar struktur DAG jadi optimasi kontinu smooth, bukan kombinatorik

author: Athey et al. (2019)
title: Generalized Random Forests
why: Generalisasi forest ke moment equations: heterogenitas apa pun bisa diestimasi

author: Chernozhukov et al. (2018)
title: Double/Debiased Machine Learning for Treatment and Structural Parameters
why: Double ML: Neyman-orthogonal + cross-fitting biar estimasi kausal tak bias
